title: Void's essentially optimized pack
description: This modpack aims to optimize the game and add QoL features like zoom, fullbright, replay, minimap, shaders, optifine compatibility,native wayland support and much more!
body:
## The pack:

Essentially Optimized is made to optimize your game and add useful quality of life features for both single player or server usage.


**It would be helpful if you could follow the project :)**

## Updates:

It is updated as soon as i have time for it or it's logical.  
> **This is usually 1-7 days.** 

## Features:

>▶️╏**Very good performance**  
>▶️╏**Preconfigured mods and options**  
>▶️╏**Default texture pack profiles**  
>▶️╏**Updates don't override YOUR configs!**  
>▶️╏**Fullbright**  
>▶️╏**Voice Chat**  
>▶️╏**Zoom**  
>▶️╏**Minimap and worldmap**  
>▶️╏**Better F3 menu**  
>▶️╏**Searchable keybinds**  
>▶️╏**In game account switching**  
>▶️╏**Controller support**  
>▶️╏**Recording gameplay**  
>▶️╏**In game shader, data and resource pack downloading!**  
>▶️╏**You can update mods in game!!**  
>▶️╏**Infinite render distance***  
>▶️╏**Older server compatibility**  
>▶️╏**PvP utilities**  
>▶️╏**Better chat**   
>▶️╏**Individual volume controll**  
>▶️╏**Native wayland(wayGL) support**  
>▶️╏**Fast updates**  
                                                                                                                                                   
>* _Render Distance can be configured in the Bobby mod, by default the max is set to 64._


<details>
<summary>Incompatibilities</summary>

No known incompatibilities for the latest version(s).


</details>
